title: New Republic era
content:
{{Top|real|new}} [[File:Era-new.png|thumb|right|300px|The symbol designating the New Republic Era]] The '''[[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] era''' takes place between [[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]] (one year after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]) and [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]] (the beginning of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]). ==New Republic era== ===[[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]]=== [[File:Glove_of_Darth_Vader.jpg|thumb|right|200px|''[[The Glove of Darth Vader]]'', first novel of the [[Jedi Prince]] series]] *{{Tales|22|Marooned}} *{{Journal|3|Blasters for Hire}} *''[[Luke Skywalker and the Shadows of Mindor]]'' *''[[The Glove of Darth Vader]]'' *''[[The Lost City of the Jedi]]'' *''[[Zorba the Hutt's Revenge]]'' *''[[Mission from Mount Yoda]]'' *''[[Queen of the Empire]]'' *[[Prophets of the Dark Side (novel)|''Prophets of the Dark Side'']] *''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Dark Forces II]]'' *''[[Dark Forces: Rebel Agent]]'' *''[[Dark Forces: Jedi Knight]]'' *''[[Boba Fett: Twin Engines of Destruction]]'' *''[[Star Wars Battlefront: Elite Squadron]]'' *{{InsiderCite|126|Buyer's Market (Insider 126)}} *''[[Zeltros: Pleasure Planet]]'' *''[[Hoth: Under the Ice]]'' ===c.[[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]] – c.[[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]]=== *[[The Politics of Contraband (adventure)|''The Politics of Contraband'' (adventure)]] *''[[The Art of Betrayal]]'' *''[[Free Time]]'' *''[[The Right Place ...]]'' *''[[Easy Money]]'' ===[[6 ABY/Legends|6 ABY]]=== [[File:XWRogueSquadron.jpg|thumb|right|200px|'''Rogue Squadron''', first novel of the [[Star Wars: X-Wing (novel series)|X-Wing series]] by [[Michael A. Stackpole]]]] *{{Journal|7|The Kaal Connection}} *{{GalaxyCite|2|The Battle of Cadinth}} *''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' *{{Hyperspace|url=hyperspace/fiction/feature20081031.html|text=Fists of Ion|int=Fists of Ion}} *''[[Deader than a Triton Moon]]'' *{{Journal|2|Whispers in the Dark}} *{{Journal|7|Missed Chance}} *''[[X-Wing: Rogue Squadron]]'' *[[X-Wing: Rogue Squadron (unabridged *''[[X-Wing: Isard's Revenge]]'' *{{Journal|6|Rendezvous with Destiny}} *{{Journal|8|Blaze of Glory (short story)}} *{{Journal|12|Betrayal by Knight}} ===[[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]]=== {{Quote|One Jedi cannot conquer the dark side alone…I guess we've proved that. ''Together'', we were a Jedi fire that outshone his evil.''"
"''Two are more powerful than one…''three'' are more powerful than two.|Luke Skywalker and Leia Organa Solo|audio=ForceHarmony-DE.flac|[[Dark Empire (audio)|''Dark Empire'' audio drama]]}} *[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Mysteries of the Sith|''Jedi Knight: Mysteries of the Sith'']] *{{Journal|7|Retreat from Coruscant}} *''[[A Change of Command]]'' ([[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game|SWRPG]])'' *{{WEGCite|book=Dark Empire Sourcebook|story=Down And Out On Coruscant|stext=''Down And Out On Coruscant''}} *''[[Star Wars: Dark Empire]]'' *''[[A Rebel's Job is Never Done ...]]'' ([[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game|SWRPG]])'' *[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron (video game)|''Star Wars: Rogue Squadron'']] *''[[Star Wars: Dark Empire II]]'' *''[[Boba Fett: Bounty on Bar-Kooda]]'' *''[[Boba Fett: When the Fat Lady Swings]]'' *''[[Boba Fett: Murder Most Foul]]'' ===[[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]]=== {{Quote|If that great statue was any indication, Vader was a terrifying figure indeed.''"
"''And now I stand in his place at the right hand of the Emperor himself. Nothing can stop me!|audio=XecrNist-NothingCanStopMe.flac|One of the Dark Jedi and Xecr Nist|[[Empire's End (audio)|''Empire's End'' audio drama]]}} [[File:DETPB-FullCoverArt.jpg|thumb|right|350px|The cover art for the [[Star Wars: Dark Empire (trade paperback)|trade paperback release]] of [[Star Wars: Dark Empire|''Dark Empire'']], a [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] series by [[Tom Veitch]]]] *''[[Boba Fett: Agent of Doom]]'' *''[[Star Wars: Empire's End]]'' *''[[Star Wars: Crimson Empire]]'' *''[[The Bounty Hunters: Kenix Kil]]'' *''[[Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood]]'' *''[[Jedi Search]]'' *{{Journal|15|Firestorm (short story)}} *[[Dark Apprentice (novel)|''Dark Apprentice'']] *''[[Champions of the Force]]'' *''[[I, Jedi]]'' *{{Tales|16|The Other (comic story)}} *{{Journal|14|From the Files of Corellia Antilles}} ===[[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]]=== {{Quote|Thanks to you, the weakling Jedi who scorned me will soon be erased from history, replaced by a new race of warriors; strong warriors, warriors who know that the Force is not a shield to protect the useless… but is, in reality, a weapon… to empower the worthy!|Desann to [[Kyle Katarn]]|audio=Desannthanks.flac|''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight II: Jedi Outcast]]''}} *{{Hyperspace|url=fans/hyperspace/fiction/shadesofgray/index.html|text=''Shades of Gray''|int=Shades of Gray}} *''[[Rebel Jedi]]'' *''[[Nightsaber]]'' *{{StoryCite|story=Simple Tricks|book=Tales from the New Republic}} *[[Children of the Jedi (novel)|''Children of the Jedi'']] *[[Darksaber (novel)|''Darksaber'']] *''[[Jedi Academy: Leviathan]]'' *''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight II: Jedi Outcast]]'' *{{Hyperspace|url=fans/hyperspace/source/feature20081201.html|text=Castaways of Endor|int=Castaways of Endor}} ===[[13 ABY/Legends|13 ABY]]=== *''[[X-Wing: Starfighters of Adumar]]'' *{{Journal|14|Murder in Slushtime}} *''[[Planet of Twilight]]'' *''[[Hard Currency]]'' *''[[The Third Time Pays for All]]'' *''[[Star Wars: Crimson Empire III—Empire Lost]]'' ===[[14 ABY/Legends|14 ABY]]=== *{{Tales|8|The Secret Tales of Luke's Hand!}} *''[[The Crystal Star]]'' *{{Tales|11|Tall Tales (Star Wars Tales)}} *[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy|''Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy'']] *''[[Vandelhelm: Enemies and Alloys]]'' *''[[Bespin: Action Tidings]]'' ([[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game|SWRPG]])'' ===[[15 ABY/Legends|15 ABY]]=== *{{Tales|19|Collapsing New Empires}} ===[[16 ABY/Legends|16 ABY]]=== [[File:Beforethestormcover.jpg|thumb|right|200px|'''Before the Storm''', the first novel of [[The Black Fleet Crisis]] series by [[Michael P.
